description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Container that builds and deploys a Docker container to GHCR when code is pushed to the main branch in the libgeos/geos repository, excluding changes in the web directory. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-latest environment, check out the code, set up Docker Buildx, log in to GHCR using the repository owner's credentials, copy the Dockerfile, and then build and push the container with the latest tag.
